tasks.title: Define SQLite schema with all entities (users, messages, projects, tasks, decisions, risks, follow-ups, summaries, patterns) and required fields (description, source_message_id, made_at, owner_tg_id, forwarded_from_chat, notified_at, created_at, completed_at)
Initialize Telegram bot with long polling, command routing, and inline keyboard handling (architecture diagram)
Implement message intake for text/voice/image/document with STT/OCR and metadata storage (forwarded_from_chat, media_url)
Build rules-first categorizer with NLP fallback (deterministic rules first, optional NLP)
Create capture card UI with category buttons and project picker (cat:new, proj:pick)
Implement sequential task creation (title → priority → deadline) with inline editing
Handle decision creation/resolution with context and outcome fields
Implement risk tracking with severity, mitigation, and owner assignment
Build follow-up tracking with 24h pre-deadline notifications and notified_at field
Schedule weekly digest generation (Sunday 18:00 user-local) with JSON export only
Implement nightly pattern detection (03:00) for recurring phrases ≥3x in 7 days
Generate JSON export for all user data including last 4 summaries (resolves PDF/JSON contradiction)
Implement 60s cron job to check follow-ups with deadline ≤ now + 24h and send reminders
